description: Enterprise version of popular meditation app offering mindfulness training, sleep tools, and mental health support for employees. Used by 3000+ organizations including Starbucks, Adobe, and Hyatt.
business_model: B2B - SaaS subscription sold to HR/benefits teams
funding_stage: Public (merged with Ginger to form Headspace Health)
key_investors: Now publicly traded; formerly backed by Spectrum Equity, Times Bridge
competitive_advantage: Consumer brand recognition, clinical validation, comprehensive mental health suite

varden_fit.rationale: Complementary to occupational health - could bundle with Varden services
